name: InputValidationEventArgs
summary: The InputValidationEventArgs class provides the event argument for pick ending events.

properties.name: ContinueSession
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the picking session should continue even though the picking is done.
properties.remarks:
The effect of this flag (forcing the continuation of the picking session) is only valid if the picking
session is not interrupted, i.e. the session is finishing by a request from the user, and not by an
interrupt event.
